mapper.sql:
select ds.last_update_time , ds.device_status_id , ds.device_name , dte.type_name , dse.status_name , ds.device_type_enum_device_type_enum_id_1 , ds.device_status_enum_device_status_enum_id_1
FROM device_status ds left join device_type_enum dte on ds.device_type_enum_device_type_enum_id_1 = dte.device_type_enum_id left join device_status_enum dse on ds.device_status_enum_device_status_enum_id_1 = dse.device_status_enum_id
mapper.select:
select ds.last_update_time , ds.device_status_id , ds.device_name , dte.type_name , dse.status_name , ds.device_type_enum_device_type_enum_id_1 , ds.device_status_enum_device_status_enum_id_1
FROM device_status ds left join
device_type_enum
dte on ds.device_type_enum_device_type_enum_id_1 = dte.device_type_enum_id left join
device_status_enum
dse on ds.device_status_enum_device_status_enum_id_1 = dse.device_status_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
